◎简　　介  

　　Alexandre, a young and honest farmer, is oppressed by an authoritarian wife, who makes him work like a dog. When she dies in a car crash, he decides to stay in bed, absolutely free and inactive. Just a dog is occupied to carry food and newspapers to him.Lorsque sa femme meurt, Alexandre décide de se consacrer à sa grande passion: la paresse. Il se couche pour plusieurs semaine...
